name: save_expense
description: Persist a validated expense record for a user. Call this only after the extraction is validated (totals reconcile, fields present). The gateway enforces a Cedar policy on the total amount before this runs.

user_id.description: The end-user id this expense belongs to

total.description: Grand total. The gateway Cedar policy gates this amount.

line_items.description: Line items, each {description, qty, unitPrice, amount}

rung.description: Degradation rung this receipt was processed on (e.g. L0)

source_receipt_s3.description: S3 URI of the source receipt for provenance
